professional_title: GRC & Process Improvement Professional | Six Sigma Black Belt | Compliance & Risk Management Specialist
professional_summary: I am a Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) and Process Improvement professional with over 10 years of experience driving enterprise risk management, regulatory compliance, and operational excellence across complex IT environments. My background bridges cybersecurity, compliance, and continuous improvement, allowing me to translate technical risk into well-governed, scalable business processes aligned with frameworks such as SOX, SOC 2, PCI DSS, GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA, and NIST. Most recently at NBCUniversal, I led data governance, vulnerability lifecycle management, and compliance initiatives supporting GDPR, CCPA, PCI, SOX, PII, and SOC 2 requirements. I partnered closely with internal audit, legal, privacy, engineering, and operations teams to design, test, and document security and IT general controls, maintain audit readiness, and reduce manual compliance effort through automation. My work included implementing ServiceNow workflows, developing compliance training, managing enterprise vulnerability assessments using tools like Nessus and Qualys, and ensuring consistent control execution across hundreds of systems. As a Lean Six Sigma Black Belt, I bring a structured, data-driven approach to risk reduction and process optimization. I specialize in identifying control gaps, standardizing workflows, improving change and access governance, and embedding compliance into day-to-day operations. I have a proven track record of improving remediation SLA adherence, increasing audit pass rates, and reducing compliance-related incidents through thoughtful control design and cross-functional collaboration. I am passionate about mentoring junior analysts, strengthening risk awareness, and fostering a culture of continuous improvement. With experience spanning GRC engineering, change management, network engineering, and technical support leadership, I thrive in environments where governance, technology, and business objectives intersect. Fluent in English and Spanish, I enjoy working in diverse, fast-paced organizations to deliver secure, compliant, and sustainable solutions that support long-term business goals.
